name: IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_VL
query: SELECT IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B.SETTING_ID SETTING_ID, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B.FONT_NUMBER FONT_NUMBER, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B.SETTING_NUMBER SETTING_NUMBER, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_TL.STYLE STYLE, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_TL.WEIGHT WEIGHT FROM IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_TL WHERE IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_B.SETTING_ID = IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_TL.SETTING_ID AND IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_SET_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
